/usr/bin/ar qc libfcw_lib.a  CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/utils/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/camera/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/preprocessing/image_preprocess.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/detection/yolov8_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/detection/nms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/tracking/object_tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/tracking/track.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/tracking/hungarian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/distance/distance_estimator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/distance/bev_distance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/motion/speed_estimator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/motion/kitti_oxts_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/ttc/ttc_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/risk/collision_risk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/warning/warning_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/warning/audio_alert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/visualization/visualization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/core/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fcw_lib.dir/src/core/threaded_pipeline.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfcw_lib.a
